content.summary: Malaysia is a key export destination with moderate risk. Political stability is generally good. ASEAN free trade agreement benefits apply. Some bureaucratic delays in customs.
content.paymentPreference: T/T standard; L/C for large orders
bestPractices: Halal certification (JAKIM) is mandatory for food products
ASEAN Certificate of Origin reduces import duties
Standard Nasional Malaysia (SIRIM) certification for electronics
